ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of station (e.g., Fire, Police, EMS) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the station */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the station */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the station */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the station */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the station */,
  "station_capacity" TEXT /* Capacity of the station */,
  "station_availability" TEXT /* Availability of the station */,
  "station_specialties" TEXT /* Specialties or areas of expertise for the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "inci_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "inci_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  "inci_type_category" TEXT /* Category of the incident type */,
  "inci_type_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the incident type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inci_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarm_types" (
  "alm_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm type */,
  "alm_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the alarm type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alarm type */,
  "alm_type_trigger" TEXT /* Trigger for the alarm */,
  "alm_type_sensitivity" TEXT /* Sensitivity level of the alarm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alm_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of unit (e.g., Fire Truck, Ambulance, Police Vehicle) */,
  "unit_status" TEXT /* Status of the unit (e.g., Available, Offline) */,
  "unit_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station assigned to the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personnel" (
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personnel */,
  "personnel_name" TEXT /* Name of the personnel */,
  "personnel_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station assigned to the personnel */,
  "personnel_role" TEXT /* Role of the personnel (e.g., Firefighter, Paramedic, Police Officer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("personnel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_unit_assignments" (
  "inci_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit assigned to the incident */,
  "assignment_time" TEXT /* Time of assignment */
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_personnel_assignments" (
  "inci_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the personnel assigned to the incident */,
  "assignment_time" TEXT /* Time of assignment */
)
column_names: Type of station (e.g., Fire, Police, EMS)
Contact phone number for the station
Specialties or areas of expertise for the station
Unique identifier for each incident type
Unique identifier for each alarm type
Type of unit (e.g., Fire Truck, Ambulance, Police Vehicle)
Status of the unit (e.g., Available, Offline)
ID of the station assigned to the unit
ID of the station assigned to the personnel
Role of the personnel (e.g., Firefighter, Paramedic, Police Officer)
ID of the unit assigned to the incident
ID of the personnel assigned to the incident
